diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class and types (Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType)
+- Internal names noticed: Hono (imported from ./hono)
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point re-exports the Hono framework class and commonly used types from submodules.
+- Copy-safe detail: 53 lines, acts as type + runtime export bundle for the Hono framework.
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Types for bind/vars, env, Input, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, RouterRoute, HandlerInterface, NotFoundResponse, ErrorHandler, HTTPResponseError
+- Internal names noticed: BlankEnv, BlankSchema, BlankInput, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergeSchemaPath, MergePath, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, ToSchema, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, ExtractInput, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, Simplify, RemoveBlankRecord, UnionToIntersection
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions for Hono handlers, routing, schemas, inputs, and response types.
+- Copy-safe detail: 160+ lines, contains type-only exports with no runtime code.
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase (extends it)
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Primary Hono class that extends HonoBase, adds default router setup, and exports at module root.
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, thin wrapper around HonoBase with optional router configuration.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use methods, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, fetch, request, fire
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, compose, Context, Router, Env, H, NotfoundHandler, ErrorHandler, getParam, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, COMPOSED_HANDLER, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, routes, _basePath, #path
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Core Hono base class with routing, middleware, error handling, request dispatching, and adapter support.
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines, implements the main application lifecycle and router integration.
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, renderer, layout, getter/setter for env vars, headers(), set(), get(), var, newResponse, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, Result, Env, Input, NotFoundHandler, RouterRoute, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, BodyRespond, NewResponse, Set, Get, Renderer, ResponseOrInit, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, resolveCallback, setDefaultContentType, createResponseInstance
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime
+- Plain-English summary: Request context with env vars, response helpers (text/json/html), header/status methods, and middleware execution tracking.
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines, central request/response coordination.
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, param, query, queries, header, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData, valid, addValidatedData, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath, cloneRawRequest
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Result, Input, ValidationTargets, parseBody, parseFormData, Body, BodyCache
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper around Fetch API, exposes URL/path/method, param/query/header extraction, body parsing (json/text/form), validation data.
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines, runtime request handling middleware.
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol export
+- Internal names noticed: none
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Single constant symbol for matching result type.
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line, type symbol for pattern matching on match result.
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody, BodyData type, ParseBodyOptions, ParseBody interface
+- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Parses request body as FormData or URL-encoded into JSON object format.
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines, form-data to object conversion with dot/arrays support.
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch, Context, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Composes an array of middleware/handlers into a single middleware with index tracking and error/notFound handler support.
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, koa-compose style middleware dispatcher.
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class, getResponse() method
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, ContentfulStatusCode, HTTPExceptionOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Exception class thrown for auth failures and similar errors, includes an optional Response object and getsResponse() method.
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, derives Response with status code and message.
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc() function, parseResponse() function, DetailedError export, type exports (InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse)
+- Internal names noticed: none
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client module with hc factory and parseResponse utility, exports inferred types for client usage.
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, module re-export hub.
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc() function, ClientRequestImpl class, fetch method
+- Internal names noticed: createProxy, ClientRequestImpl, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, serialize, UnionToIntersection, WebSocket
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Creates typed HTTP client proxy via hc(), handles query params, path params, request body, headers, and returns fetch calls.
+- Copy-safe detail: 223 lines, proxy-based client with URL/path/method/schema inference.
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, TypedURL, Response
+- Internal names noticed: ExpandAllMethod, StandardMethods, MethodNameAll, HonoRequest, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, ParseHostName, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, IsEmptyObject, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, GlobalResponseDefinition, PickRoute, PickSchema, ClientResponseOfEndpoint, InferEndpointType, InferResponseTypeFromEndpoint
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for HTTP client, method schemas, request/response inference, path building, URL construction, global response apply filter.
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines, client request/response types and schema mapping.
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: parseResponse() function, DetailedError export, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, isObject
+- Internal names noticed: fetchRP, BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientResponse, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, ObjectType, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: ./fetch-result-please, ../utils/http-status, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for path merging, URL param replacement, search params building, protocol switching, JSON parsing with DetailedError.
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines, client request building helpers.
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP() function, DetailedError class, detectResponseType() function, jsonRegex constant
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Minimal fetch-response parser that infers json/text from content-type and throws DetailedError on non-2xx responses, copied from ofetch.
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines, smart response parsing with structured errors.
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function
+- Internal names noticed: handle, fire, HandleOptions, Hono, Env, Schema
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Registers a Hono app as a Service Worker with addEventListener('fetch', handle(...)).
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines, wraps app.fetch in addEventListener for sw.
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function
+- Internal names noticed: HandleOptions, Hono, Env, FetchEvent, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker fetch handler that calls app.fetch, falls back to fallback fetch on 404.
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines, SW fetch event handler.
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent, ExtendableEvent
+- Internal names noticed: clientId, handled, preloadResponse, resultingClientId, waitUntil, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker event types with respondWith and preloadResponse support.
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines, SW request event interface.
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
I need to list the files in bench-artifacts directory to check if it exists and what's already there.
